title: Beware of AI Voice Print Thieves! The Ministry of State Security Reveals Three Risks of Speech Deep Synthesis
excerpt: The rapid development of artificial intelligence technology has made voice cloning accessible, but it also brings new challenges to social order and personal pr
content_html:
The rapid development of artificial intelligence technology has made voice cloning accessible, but it also brings new challenges to social order and personal property security. The Ministry of State Security recently issued a security alert, thoroughly analyzing the risks and hidden dangers behind AI voice cloning technology.

Current AI voice cloning can sample at an extremely fast speed, even accurately replicating a voice with just three to five seconds of audio samples. The success rate for ordinary people to identify such high-quality forged voice is less than 50% without any warning.

Additionally, many online platforms have introduced "one-click cloning" features, greatly lowering the threshold for abuse of this technology. When voices are no longer trustworthy, criminals begin using synthesized voices to fabricate urgent situations and commit fraud.

Various infringement issues frequently occur; legal red lines must not be crossed

Aside from acquaintance fraud, using AI to forge celebrities' voices for commercial promotion and traffic generation is also common. Worse still, some maliciously clone the voices of public officials to create false statements and policy interpretations, seriously misleading the public.

In response to these issues, China has established a complete legal regulatory system covering civil, administrative, and criminal aspects. Unauthorized cloning or spreading of others' voices is considered an infringement, and using this technology to commit crimes will result in severe criminal penalties.

Online platforms must effectively fulfill their primary responsibilities, strengthening the cleanup and review of illegal tools. The general public should also enhance their awareness of prevention, properly protect their own voiceprint information, and ensure multiple verifications when involving financial operations.

sentences.zh: 未经授权克隆或传播他人声音被视为侵权，利用该技术实施犯罪将受到严厉的刑事处罚。

sentences.en: The general public should also enhance their awareness of prevention, properly protect their own voiceprint information, and ensure multiple verifications when involving financial operations.
sentences.zh: 广大公众也应增强防范意识，妥善保护自己的声纹信息，在涉及金融操作时确保多重验证。

content_html_zh:
人工智能技术的快速发展，让语音克隆变得触手可及，但也给社会秩序和个人财产安全带来了新的挑战。 国家安全部近日发布安全警示，深入剖析人工智能语音克隆技术背后的风险和隐患。

目前的人工智能语音克隆可以以极快的速度进行采样，甚至只需三到五秒的音频样本即可准确复制声音。 在没有任何警告的情况下，普通人识别这种高质量伪造语音的成功率不到50%。

此外，不少网络平台还推出了“一键克隆”功能，大大降低了该技术被滥用的门槛。 当声音不再可信时，犯罪分子开始使用合成声音来制造紧急情况并实施欺诈。

各类侵权问题频发；不得跨越法律红线

除了熟人诈骗之外，利用人工智能伪造明星声音进行商业推广、产生流量的现象也很常见。 更有什者，有的恶意克隆公职人员声音，制造虚假言论和政策解读，严重误导公众。

针对这些问题，中国建立了涵盖民事、行政、刑事等方面的完整法律监管体系。 未经授权克隆或传播他人声音被视为侵权，利用该技术实施犯罪将受到严厉的刑事处罚。

网络平台要切实履行主体责任，加强对违法工具的清理和审查。 广大公众也应增强防范意识，妥善保护自己的声纹信息，在涉及金融操作时确保多重验证。
